response_measurement_contract.measured_objects: reversible one-parameter response orbit families on the two derived charged sectors, one scale per isotypic band plus one common odd sign

reversible_response_automorphisms.source: reversible response orbit families on the derived charged sectors; the family realizes the proper carrier automorphisms on those sectors
reversible_response_automorphisms.note: currents are generated by the response generators on the charged sectors; the register-relabeling realization of the same automorphisms is typed separately and provably cannot generate them

ledger.description: coordination defect repair record on the r0 stage; typed irreversible and excluded from the current construction
